source_pr.title: load data: time and log for different phase, use err group in chunk_process
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #42930 

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?
- time and log each sub phase
- use error group in chunk_process

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

existing ut is enough
- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
  - return err on encode or deliver loop, make sure encoder do exist with err
  - return err and check log
  - normal run check log
```log
[2023/04/20 16:43:11.388 +08:00] [INFO] [backend.go:347] ["import start"] [engineTag=`load_data`.`t`:-1] [engineUUID=4c983745-cf08-5412-9f4a-17b9f1b1e2e3] [retryCnt=0]
[2023/04/20 16:43:11.388 +08:00] [INFO] [backend.go:362] ["cleanup start"] [engineTag=`load_data`.`t`:-1] [engineUUID=4c983745-cf08-5412-9f4a-17b9f1b1e2e3]
[2023/04/20 16:43:11.403 +08:00] [INFO] [table_import.go:298] ["post process start"] [table=`load_data`.`t`]
[2023/04/20 16:43:11.403 +08:00] [INFO] [table_import.go:310] ["checksum start"] [table=`load_data`.`t`]
```
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: race = "on",.

evidence: files: br/pkg/lightning/log/log.go, executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/chunk_process.go, executor/importer/engine_process.go, executor/importer/engine_process_test.go, executor/importer/table_import.go

analysis:
PR title: load data: time and log for different phase, use err group in chunk_process
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/43245
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: race = "on",
Changed files (6): br/pkg/lightning/log/log.go, executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, executor/importer/chunk_process.go, executor/importer/engine_process.go, executor/importer/engine_process_test.go, executor/importer/table_import.go
Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
